{"credits": [{"type": "finder", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/253543362?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/aisafe-bot/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/aisafe-bot/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/aisafe-bot/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/aisafe-bot/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/aisafe-bot", "id": 253543362, "login": "aisafe-bot", "node_id": "U_kgDODxzDwg", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/aisafe-bot/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/aisafe-bot/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/aisafe-bot/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/aisafe-bot/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/aisafe-bot/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/aisafe-bot", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-45576", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:A/VC:N/VI:H/VA:N/SC:H/SI:H/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-22", "name": "Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')"}], "description": "## Summary

Alice runs `zrok2 copy` from a WebDAV or zrok drive controlled by Bob into a local filesystem target. Bob returns a DAV `href` such as `/../outside.txt`. The sync pipeline stores that path in the source inventory and passes it to `FilesystemTarget.WriteStream`, which joins it with the target root and creates the file outside Alice's selected directory.

### Impact
Users given access to a zrok share may be able to traverse the directory tree arbitrarily with the sharing users credentials, allowing for sensitive information to be overwritten.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00359, "percentile": 0.28178}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-c656-jcx2-7pqj", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-19T15:38:56Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c656-jcx2-7pqj", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-c656-jcx2-7pqj"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-45576"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-19T15:38:56Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openziti/zrok/security/advisories/GHSA-c656-jcx2-7pqj", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c656-jcx2-7pqj"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openziti/zrok/security-advisories/GHSA-c656-jcx2-7pqj", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openziti/zrok", "summary": "zrok copy writes attacker-controlled WebDAV paths outside the destination root", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-19T15:38:57Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-c656-jcx2-7pqj", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.0.3", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/openziti/zrok/v2"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2.0.3"}, {"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/openziti/zrok"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 0.4.23, <= 1.1.11"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: zrok copy writes attacker-controlled WebDAV paths outside the destination root
